about.body: Chara is an open-source, self-hostable way to split bills with friends. Make a group, add expenses, settle up — no ads, no upsells, no data harvesting.
about.tagline: Split it. Settle it. Call it quits.
about.title: About

accounts.removeBalanceCheckFailedBody: We need to check your balances on this server before removing the account. Try again when you're online.
accounts.removeBlockedOpenBalanceBody: You still have open balances in groups on {{host}}. Settle them before removing this account.
accounts.removeConfirmBody: Your data stays on the server. You can add the account back any time.
accounts.signOutAllBlockedBody: You still have open balances on {{hosts}}. Settle them before signing out of everything.
accounts.signOutAllConfirmBody: You'll go back to the sign-in screen. Your data stays on each server.
accounts.title: Accounts

activity.emptyBody: Add expenses to a group and activity will appear here.
activity.loadFailed: Couldn't load activity. Pull down to retry.
activity.title: Activity

addExpense.autoFillHint: empty rows split the remainder evenly
addExpense.saveErrorBody: Could not save the expense. Please try again.
addExpense.scanReceipt: Scan receipt — or fill in below
addExpense.title: New expense

addServer.appTooNew: This server is older than Chara supports. Ask the host to update.
addServer.appTooOld: This server needs a newer Chara. Update the app.
addServer.body: Sign in to a Chara server to see groups, expenses, and balances from that instance. You can link as many servers as you like.
addServer.headline: Connect to a Chara server.
addServer.serverTooNew: This server is newer than this app supports.
addServer.serverTooOld: This server is too old for this app version.
addServer.title: Add a server
addServer.validateInvalidUrl: That URL doesn't look right. Use the form https://your-server.example.
addServer.validateNotChara: That doesn't look like a Chara server.

editGroup.currencyLockedHint: Locked — this group already has expenses.

errors.currencyLockedBody: Currency is locked once a group has expenses. Create a new group if you need a different currency.

editGroup.languageHint: AI-generated receipt titles will be written in this language for everyone in the group.

expenseDetail.staleBanner: This expense changed since you opened it. Reload to see the latest.

fx.errorHint: We'll keep the original currency. You can adjust it before saving.

groupCreated.body: Hand your phone to a friend and let them scan.

groupDetail.archivePromptBody: The group will be hidden from your list. You can still view archived groups later.
groupDetail.emptyBody: Add the first expense to this group.
groupDetail.memberNoExpenses: Not involved in any expenses yet.
groupDetail.paymentRevertBody: {{from}} paid {{to}} {{amount}}. Reverting puts this balance back.
groupDetail.paymentsEmptyBody: Settlements between members will show up here.
groupDetail.standingsEmptyBody: Add an expense to see who owes what.
groupDetail.suggestionsEmptyBody: No payments needed — everyone is square.

archiveConfirm.body: The group will be hidden from your home screen. You can unarchive any time.
archiveConfirm.title: Archive group?

deleteBlocked.body: Some members still have unsettled balances. Settle up first.
deleteBlocked.title: Can't delete yet

deleteModal.body: Every expense, settlement, receipt, and member will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
deleteModal.confirmLabel: Type the group name to confirm: {{name}}
deleteModal.title: Delete this group?

lockConfirm.body: Members won't be able to add expenses, settle, or change anything while locked.
lockConfirm.title: Lock group?

unarchiveConfirm.body: The group will reappear on your home screen.
unarchiveConfirm.title: Unarchive group?

unlockConfirm.body: Members will be able to add expenses and settle up again.
unlockConfirm.title: Unlock group?

leaveBlocked.ownerCannotLeave: Owners can't leave a group. Transfer ownership or delete the group instead.
leaveBlocked.title: Can't leave just yet

members.leaveConfirmBody: You'll lose access to {{name}} immediately. You can rejoin via invite if needed.
members.title: Members

home.homeNetSheetIntro: Your total across every group, in your home currency. It only changes when you add or settle expenses — not when currencies move.
home.noGroupsBody: Create a group to start splitting expenses.

lead.deletePlain: Deleting will reverse balances for {{count}} members.
lead.plain: Saving will update balances for {{count}} members.
lead.plain_one: Saving will update balances for 1 member.
lead.plain_other: Saving will update balances for {{count}} members.
lead.withSettlements: This expense has been settled since it was added. Your changes will shift balances:

note.crossCurrency: Note: your previous {{oldCurrency}} balance is no longer affected by this expense.
note.settlementsUnchanged: Settlements stay on record. The new balance reflects the difference.

blocked.body: {{name}} has an unsettled balance. Settle up first.
blocked.title: Can't remove {{name}} just yet

confirm.body: {{name}} will lose access to this group immediately.
confirm.title: Remove {{name}}?

onboarding.createBody: Pick a name, share the QR code with friends.
onboarding.footerHint: You can always do this later from the Groups tab.
onboarding.intro: A group is a set of people who split costs together — a trip, a flat, a side project. You can create one now or join one a friend already made.
onboarding.scanBody: Point at a friend's screen — you'll be in instantly.

onboardingName.body: Your name appears on every expense and settlement. Your phone lets friends settle up with you via Swish, Vipps, or similar.
onboardingName.headline: Tell us about you.
onboardingName.label: Full name

privacy.analyticsDescription: Helps us understand how Chara is used. No personal data, IP addresses, or content is collected. You can turn this off at any time.
privacy.title: Privacy

receiptScanner.analyzingHint: Reading the merchant, date, and totals.
receiptScanner.errorCapture: Something went wrong taking the photo. Please try again.
receiptScanner.errorUnreadable: We couldn't read a total from this image. Try again with better lighting.
receiptScanner.errorUpstream: The scanner is unavailable right now. Please try again in a moment.
receiptScanner.hint: Frame the receipt and tap to capture
receiptScanner.permissionDeniedBody: Chara needs the camera to scan receipts. Enable it in Settings, then come back.

recurring.currencyLockedHelp: {{currency}} · group currency · can't be changed later.
recurring.editFutureOnlyNotice: Changes apply to future bills only. Past expenses stay as-is.
recurring.emptyBody: Set up rent, internet, or anything that repeats — Chara will add it for you on schedule.
recurring.previewNext: Will create the next bill on {{date}} at {{time}} ({{tz}}).

push.expenseAutoPostedCatchup: {{title}} · {{amount}} auto-added · you owe {{share}} (catching up after offline)
push.pausedCatchupOverflow: {{title}} auto-paused — we've been offline too long to safely catch up. Tap to review.
push.pausedGroupLocked_one: Group locked — {{title}} won't auto-add until the group is unlocked. Tap to review.
push.pausedGroupLocked_other: Group locked — {{title}} and {{extra}} other bills won't auto-add until the group is unlocked. Tap to review.
push.pausedMemberLeft: Heads up: {{name}} left the group, so {{title}} won't auto-add until you update who's splitting it. Tap to fix.

recurring.resumeAllBanner_one: {{count}} bill is paused from when the group was locked.
recurring.resumeAllBanner_other: {{count}} bills are paused from when the group was locked.

scanItems.assignSheetHint: Select one or more people. Tap again to remove.
scanItems.subtitle: Tap an item to assign it to people.
scanItems.title: Items on this receipt
scanItems.totalMismatch: Items + tax + tip don't match the receipt total. Adjust amounts before continuing.
scanItems.unassignedWarning: {{count}} item is unassigned — its amount will split equally.
scanItems.unassignedWarning_one: 1 item is unassigned — its amount will split equally.
scanItems.unassignedWarning_other: {{count}} items are unassigned — their amounts will split equally.
scanItems.unassignedWarning_plural: {{count}} items are unassigned — their amounts will split equally.

scanJoin.addAccountPrompt: This invite is on {{host}}. Add an account?
scanJoin.invalidQr: That doesn't look like a Chara invite QR. Try again.
scanJoin.unreachable: Couldn't reach {{host}}. The invite link may be old, or the server may be down.

scanner.hint: point at a Chara group QR
scanner.permissionDeniedBody: Chara needs the camera to scan invite QR codes. Enable it in Settings, then come back.

securityCode.confirmBody: Re-enter the code to make sure it matches.
securityCode.createBody: Choose a 4 or 6 digit code. You'll enter it to open Chara.
securityCode.disableBody: Anyone with access to your phone will be able to open Chara.
securityCode.enterCurrentBody: Confirm your current code to make changes.
securityCode.errorMismatch: The codes didn't match. Try again.
securityCode.title: Security code

settle.allQuitsBody: No transfers needed in this group.
settle.title: Settle up

settleMethod.fxErrorAmount: Enter the amount you actually paid.
settleMethod.fxErrorSameCurrency: Use the regular payment methods when paying in the same currency.
settleMethod.fxIntro: Clear a debt of {{amount}} from {{name}} by paying in a different currency. The original debt stays unchanged; we record what you actually moved.
settleMethod.fxRateError: Couldn't fetch a rate. Enter it manually.
settleMethod.swishMissingPhoneBody: {{name}} hasn't added a Swedish mobile number yet. Ask them to set one in You → Profile, or use another method.
settleMethod.swishNote: Swish opens with the amount and message pre-filled. We mark it settled when you return.
settleMethod.swishRoundingNote: Swish only accepts whole kronor, so we'll round {{original}} up to {{rounded}}.
settleMethod.swishTipNote: Swish can only transfer whole kronor, so you'll send {{swish}}. That clears your {{debt}} debt; the extra {{tip}} is a tip to {{name}} — not a new balance.
settleMethod.swishUnavailableBody: The Swish app doesn't seem to be installed on this device. Use another method, or install Swish and try again.
settleMethod.swishWaitBody: Tap Open Swish to pay {{name}}. Swish will pre-fill the amount and recipient. Once you've sent the payment, come back here and confirm.

signIn.checkEmailBody: We sent a magic link to {{email}}. Tap it to sign in.
signIn.headline:
Split it.
Settle it.
Call it quits.

waitlist.body: We're keeping receipt scans limited while we figure out hosting plans. Drop your email and we'll let you know when more capacity ships.
waitlist.errorBadEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
waitlist.errorGeneric: Couldn't sign you up. Please try again.
waitlist.selfHostHint: Or self-host Chara for unlimited everything
waitlist.title: You've used your {{cap}} free receipt scans this month

avatar.permissionBody: Grant photo or camera access in Settings to change your profile photo.

you.faceIdPrompt: Confirm to enable Face ID for payments
you.faceIdUnavailableBody: Your device doesn't support biometric authentication, or none is enrolled.

openSource.body: You're using chara.app — our hosted beta. The app itself is free and open-source. You can self-host it on your own machine, with no caps.

you.rateAppStore: Rate us on the App Store
you.ratePlayStore: Rate us on the Play Store
you.rateUnavailableBody: Chara isn't published to a store yet.
you.shareMessage: I've been splitting bills with Chara — check it out: https://chara.app
you.title: Profile
